reasoning: To predict whether Mistral AI will have the top AI model on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard by December 31, 2025, we look at the historical leaderboard performance and current trajectory of compute and scaling. Mistral releases highly efficient frontier-class models (like Mistral Large 2), but they have never held the #1 overall spot, which is furiously contested by tech giants with vastly greater compute resources: OpenAI (o-series, GPT-5 on the horizon), Google (Gemini 2.0), Anthropic (Claude 3.5/4), xAI (Grok 3), and more recently, DeepSeek. It's extremely unlikely that Mistral will build a frontier model that eclipses the next generation of models from these better-funded rivals to claim the single highest Elo score. Since the lower bound for predictions is often 0.02, I will use that as the probability.
